address.description: The email address of the mailing list

name.description: The name of the mailing list

description.description: A description of the mailing list

access_level.description: List access level, one of: readonly, members, everyone

reply_preference.description: Set where replies should go: list or sender

created_at.description: Timestamp indicating the mailing list creation time in RFC 5322 format

members_count.description: The number of members on the mailing list
